raw_consumer_statement: I had identify theft where someone used my credit card and created fraudulent charges. The merchant solar reviews supplied information clearly showing that another individual made the fraudulent transactions with their name, phone number, and e-mail address. American Express refuses to issue credit and rebilled my account for fraudulent charges. I B ] refuse to pay these charges and American Express is highly incompetent and unethical they are damaging my credit report on a monthly basis. I have filed identity theft reports with the police, FTC, all ( 3 ) credit bureaus. I am also in the process of filing a civil lawsuit against American Express. I demand they correct all the negative reporting to all ( 3 ) credit bureaus and credit my accounts ( 2 ) in full!
